definition: Time windows when institutional algorithms are most active.
feeds_into: liquidity_sweep (kill zones are WHEN sweeps happen)
silver_bullet (silver bullets are micro kill zones)
bridge_integration: Sessions and kill zones drive both scoring and a hard pre-gate. (1) Detection: bridge/ict_pipeline.py:596-599 calls analysis.sessions.get_session_info(datetime.now(timezone.utc)) once per analysis cycle; the resulting SessionInfo populates SymbolAnalysis.session_type (enum name), .is_kill_zone, .is_silver_bullet, plus is_macro_time and is_lunch flags read by the scorer. (2) Scoring: analysis.ict.scorer.score_ict_setup at scorer.py:320-329 awards up to 10 pts (weight['session']) — 60% if is_kill_zone, +30% if is_silver_bullet, +20% if is_macro_time, -50% (penalty) if is_lunch. Lands on SymbolAnalysis.session_score. (3) HARD PRE-GATE — KILL ZONE GATE: bridge/claude_decision.py:614-648 in _pre_gate. Trades are SKIPped unless one of: (a) is_kill_zone is True, (b) is_silver_bullet is True, (c) symbol is crypto (BTC/ETH/SOL/DOGE — exempt because crypto trades 24/7), (d) JPY pair during Tokyo window (00:00-04:00 UTC = 19:00-23:00 ET; JPY-only override added because Tokyo IS a legitimate kill zone for yen-crosses, see line 620-623 comment), or (e) Grade A signal with displacement_confirmed (strong enough signal to override timing). The gate's SKIP reason text is 'KILL ZONE GATE: Not in a kill zone or Silver Bullet window. ICT 2022 model: only trade during London (2-5AM ET), NY AM (7-10AM ET), or NY PM (1:30-3PM ET). JPY pairs also permitted during Tokyo (19:00-23:00 ET).' This is gate #8 in ARCHITECTURE.md § 4.1 and is the hardest pre-gate after Zone Gate (#6). (4) Synergies: 'Kill zone + PO3 distribution phase' +6 (synergy_scorer.py:365); 'Judas swing + kill zone' +6 (line 396); 'Silver bullet + FVG' +5 (line 402). The 'Kill zone gates session score during accumulation' anti-synergy fires when is_kill_zone is True AND session_type contains 'asian' (synergy_scorer.py:488-492) — penalty 3 — guards against incorrect kill-zone tagging during Asian hours. (5) Prompt context: claude_decision.py:987 prints 'Session: {session_type} | Kill Zone: {is_kill_zone} | Silver Bullet: {is_silver_bullet}'. claude_decision.py:136-155 also computes a separate 'active_kz' list from rules.json's time_filters.kill_zone_windows for prompt narrative. concept_injector.py and claude_decision.py:227-240 layer in the matching PO3 phase prose ('Asian'→accumulation, 'London'→manipulation, 'NY/overlap'→distribution). (6) Silver Bullet windows: surfaced as is_silver_bullet boolean only — the specific window is implicit in upstream analysis.sessions logic (3-4AM ET London SB, 10-11AM ET NY AM SB, 2-3PM ET NY PM SB per claude_decision.py:616). Per-window symbol preferences from this card (forex/gold for London SB, indices/crypto for NY AM SB) are NOT codified — they are informational context for Claude. (7) Removed: phrase gates like 'no active kill zone'/'outside kill zone'/'kill zone inactive' were tried in the post-gate _REASONING_HARD_GATE_PHRASES tuple but reverted (claude_decision.py:1090-1094 comments) — they blocked the ETH SELL +$159 winner. The kill-zone gate is therefore enforced ONLY at pre-gate, not post-gate.

asian.purpose: Range building. Mark high/low — they WILL be swept in London/NY.
asian.tradeable: Low. Only trade if clear HTF setup.
asian.creates: Liquidity levels (Asian high/low) that London and NY will sweep

london.purpose: Sweeps Asian high or low. Judas swing window.
london.targets: The liquidity (Asian high/low) built during accumulation phase

new_york.purpose: Highest volume. 10 AM is THE manipulation event.

london_close.purpose: Distribution continues. London position squaring can create counter-moves.
london_close.tradeable: Medium. Continuation trades if NY direction established.

silver_bullet_windows.connection: Silver bullets are MICRO kill zones where FVGs on M15 have highest probability

NY_AM_SB.entry: FVG fill on M15 after 10 AM manipulation
